movie.actors: Shane McDermott, Seth Green, Brittney Powell, Chris Conrad
movie.plot: Mitchell Goosen is sixteen/seventeen year old kid from California who loves to surf and roller blade. Yet, his parents, who are two zoologists were given a grant to work in Australia. The ...
movie.title: Airborne
movie.writer: Bill Apablasa (screenplay), Stephen McEveety (story), Bill Apablasa (story)
